long_answer:
<initial_plan>
1) hard_constraints:
   - The current health insurance costs €415/month total. 
   - The insurance improvements need to accommodate an active lifestyle.
   - Budget management is key; we must ensure new options remain within a manageable cost.

2) soft_constraints:
   - The user is open to improvements in coverage.
   - The user might be flexible in swapping some features for cost-effectiveness if overall coverage and budget goals are met.

3) task_decomposition:
   a. Retrieve detailed current insurance coverage information (beyond cost) to understand what improvements might be needed.
   b. Compare available insurance options that offer enhancements in physical and mental health coverage, additional wellness or active lifestyle perks or benefits.
   c. Evaluate and confirm the costs (including any additional services) to maintain or reduce the current monthly cost of €415.
   d. Produce a summary of the recommendations: detailing health_coverage, property_coverage (only if applicable), travel_coverage (only if applicable), additional_services, and total_budget.

4) data_planning:
   - Request the current insurance policy details from the {environment} (if available) to understand benefits, coverage limits, and additional services in use.
   - Possibly ask for the active lifestyle details that might be relevant to insurance features (e.g., frequent physical activity, sports, travel).
   - Ask the {external_agent} (Insurance agent) about better coverage options that include improvements in physical and mental health, including an option for active lifestyles.
   - Get detailed pricing information on recommended new options (monthly costs, any annual fees, other costs).
   - Document all newly available data into a summary for final recommendations that address health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget.

5) anticipated_changes:
   - The {environment} might provide additional details about the user's current insurance policy (coverage details, additional benefits) that could change the recommendation.
   - The Insurance agent may offer options with slightly higher premiums or require trade-offs in terms of additional services.
   - The user's active lifestyle specifics might lead to adjustments in the recommended coverage, thus final recommendations might need further personalization.

This plan will guide the next interactions to retrieve necessary insurance details, compare new options, and compile the final recommendation.
</initial_plan>

  → Total monthly: €200 + €130 + €10 = €340/month.

long_answer:
<output_to_ai_assistant>
Based on your refined request for improved insurance proposals while managing costs around the current total of approximately €415/month, here are three enhanced options for your review:

1. Improved Physical Health Coverage
   • Option: LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical Health)
     - Benefits: Comprehensive coverage including 24/7 support, low deductibles (5%), telemedicine services, and expanded specialist access for chronic and acute conditions.
     - Additional Services: Integrated chronic disease management and periodic wellness reviews.
     - Cost Breakdown: €100/month.
     - Comparison: Offers better specialist access versus the current “WellCare Essential” and is competitively priced.

2. Enhanced Mental Health Support
   • Option: LifeFirst Standard Plan (Mental Health)
     - Benefits: Comprehensive mental health services including broader counseling options, specialized treatment programs, and family therapy coverage.
     - Additional Services: Continuous care with integrated crisis intervention and ongoing therapy sessions.
     - Cost Breakdown: €65/month.
     - Comparison: Enhances the current “MindWell Basic” by expanding therapy options and 24/7 crisis support.

3. Combined Enhanced Benefits for an Active Lifestyle
   • Option: PrimeCare Premium Plan (Physical Health) combined with PrimeCare Premium for Mental Health services, plus additional wellness add-on (Telemedicine Services and Wellness Programs)
     - Benefits: 
         - Physical: Extensive coverage with dedicated specialist access, zero deductibles, and 24/7 support.
         - Mental: Comprehensive 24/7 mental health support with dedicated coordinators.
         - Active Lifestyle Perks: Inclusion of telemedicine services (24/7 virtual consultations for an extra €10/month) and wellness programs (comprehensive health coaching; €200/month, though this add-on can be optional based on coverage balance).
     • Combined Cost Breakdown (Base Options):
         - PrimeCare Premium Physical: €200/month
         - PrimeCare Premium Mental: €130/month
         - With only the essential active wellness add-on Telemedicine option: additional €10/month 
         = Total of approximately €340/month (which still stays lower than the current expense; the wellness program add-on can be added later if desired).
     • Comparison: This combined option offers premium and extensive coverage that clearly improves both physical and mental health services while including basic active lifestyle perks at a competitive, lower price than the current plan.

Please let me know if you require any further breakdown or if you’d like to adjust any preferences. I look forward to your feedback on these proposals.
</output_to_ai_assistant>
